meta.title: Tapinti — Organize Your Career. Land Your Next Job.
meta.description: Tapinti is the Personal Career CRM. Track every company, recruiter, application, resume version, interview and follow-up in one calm, connected place.
meta.ogAlt: Tapinti — the Personal Career CRM dashboard

hero.subtitle: You've applied to dozens of jobs across spreadsheets, tabs, inboxes and sticky notes. Tapinti brings every company, recruiter, application and interview into one calm place — so nothing slips, and every follow-up lands on time.

problem.title: Somewhere around application #40, everything becomes chaos.
problem.subtitle: The job search starts organized. Then it multiplies — and the tools you started with quietly give up.

quotes.q1: Which resume did I even send them?
quotes.q2: Wait… did this company already reject me?
quotes.q3: I forgot to follow up. Again.
quotes.q4: Which recruiter reached out last week?
quotes.q5: Where did I apply? I genuinely can't remember.
quotes.q6: I've applied to 120 jobs and everything is a mess.

disconnected.title: You're managing a career across seven apps that don't talk to each other.
disconnected.subtitle: Each one holds a piece of the story. None of them holds the whole thing.
disconnected.punchline: They were never designed to work together.

connected.title: Everything about your search, finally in one thread.
connected.subtitle: From the company you're eyeing to the offer you sign — every step links to the last. Nothing floats alone.

captions.company: Every company you've researched or applied to.
captions.recruiters: The people, linked to the roles they own.
captions.jobs: Each application, with its status and history.
captions.resume: The exact version you sent, attached.
captions.interview: Rounds, notes, and questions in a timeline.
captions.career: A record that compounds, search after search.

features.title: Built for people who apply seriously.
features.subtitle: Nine tools that used to live in nine apps — now working as one.

companies.title: Manage Companies
companies.desc: Store every company you've ever applied to, with notes, links and the full history in one profile.

recruiters.title: Recruiter CRM
recruiters.desc: Never lose track of a recruiter again. Every contact linked to the roles and conversations they own.

pipeline.title: Job Pipeline
pipeline.desc: Move roles through Wishlist, Preparing, Applied, HR, Technical, Offer, Accepted and Rejected — at a glance.

resumes.title: Resume Versions
resumes.desc: Know exactly which resume you sent to which company. Version it, tag it, never guess again.

interviews.title: Interview Timeline
interviews.desc: Every interview, every note, every question — captured on a timeline you can actually revisit.

followups.title: Follow-up Reminders
followups.desc: Never miss another follow-up. Tapinti nudges you the moment a thread goes quiet.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.desc: Resumes, cover letters, certificates and portfolios — attached where they belong, not lost in email.

analytics.title: Career Analytics
analytics.desc: Application, response, interview and offer rates — see what's actually working and adjust.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.desc: Resume optimization, interview prep, tailored cover letters and career insights, on demand.

mindset.title: Stop tracking jobs. Start managing your career.
mindset.subtitle: It isn't about more features. It's about a better loop.

stats.title: A calmer search, by the numbers.

testimonials.title: It finally feels like someone gets it.

t1.quote: I was juggling three spreadsheets and a Notion board. Tapinti replaced all of it in an afternoon. I actually know where I stand now.
t1.name: Elena Fischer

t2.quote: The recruiter CRM alone is worth it. I never walk into a call without the full history in front of me anymore.
t2.name: Marcus Ade

t3.quote: As a designer I care how tools feel. Tapinti is the first job-search app that doesn't make the process more stressful.
t3.name: Priya Nair

t4.quote: Fresh out of university with 90 applications out. Tapinti kept me from missing follow-ups that would've cost me interviews.
t4.name: Tomás Rivera

pricing.title: Start free. Upgrade when it pays for itself.
pricing.subtitle: No credit card to begin. Cancel anytime.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: Everything you need to get organized.

free.a: Yes. The Free plan covers everything you need to organize a real search, with no credit card and no time limit. Upgrade to Pro only when you want unlimited applications and the AI tools.

notion.q: Can I import from Notion or a spreadsheet?
notion.a: Yes. You can import companies and applications from a CSV or Notion export, so you don't start from scratch.

resumes.q: Can I upload and track multiple resumes?
resumes.a: Absolutely. Store every resume version, tag it, and Tapinti records exactly which one you sent to each company.

linkedin.a: You can save roles and recruiters you find on LinkedIn into Tapinti in a couple of clicks, and keep the conversation history alongside them.

privacy.a: Your career data is yours. It's encrypted, never sold, and you can export or delete everything at any time.

devices.q: Does it work on my phone?
devices.a: Tapinti is fully responsive and works beautifully on phone, tablet and desktop — your search stays in sync everywhere.

finalCta.title: Ready to organize your career?
finalCta.subtitle: Stop tracking jobs. Start managing your career.
finalCta.reassure: Free forever plan · No credit card · Set up in minutes

footer.tagline: The Personal Career CRM. Organize your search, land your next job.
footer.builtWith: Manage your career like sales teams manage customers.
